channel.title: JLT Monday Mindset (LinkedIn Business)
channel.description: Monday Mindset — universal lessons from Janine's founder stories, LinkedIn Business edition

item.title: Test post — JLT Monday Mindset feed setup (please delete)
item.description: This is a one-off test item so Sociamonials can validate the new Monday Mindset feed. If this appears as a draft, the feed is connected correctly … delete this draft, do not queue it.
